Class ActiveBuffTracker

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.skills.service.ActiveBuffTracker
public final class ActiveBuffTracker extends Object
Tracks which timed buff abilities are currently active per player.

This class is intentionally minimal: it records active state only. Skills are responsible for scheduling their own expiry tasks (via their owning plugin's scheduler) and calling removeBuff(UUID, String) when they expire. This keeps scheduling logic in the skill, where the owning plugin is known.

Thread-safe. All state is cleared on player unload.

    • ActiveBuffTracker

      public ActiveBuffTracker()

  • Method Details

    • hasBuff

      public boolean hasBuff(UUID uuid, String buffId)
      Returns whether the player currently has the given buff active.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      buffId - the buff identifier (e.g. "fishing:fishers-frenzy")
      Returns:
      true if the buff is active

    • addBuff

      public void addBuff(UUID uuid, String buffId)
      Marks a buff as active for a player. The caller is responsible for scheduling removal via removeBuff(UUID, String) when the buff expires.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      buffId - the buff identifier

    • removeBuff

      public void removeBuff(UUID uuid, String buffId)
      Removes a buff from a player. Call this when the buff expires or is cancelled.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      buffId - the buff identifier

    • clearPlayer

      public void clearPlayer(UUID uuid)
      Removes all active buffs for a player. Call on player quit/unload.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
